zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres於1129年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯蒙泰古時，她的父親Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine54歲，母親Adelheid van Leuven40歲。她和Raoul de Nesle II至少有3個兒子。她去世於從1188年到1197年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres于1129年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯蒙泰古时，她的父亲Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine54岁，母亲Adelheid van Leuven40岁。她和Raoul de Nesle II至少有3个儿子。她去世于从1188年到1197年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres was born in 1129, in Montaigu, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, was 54 and her mother, Adelheid van Leuven, was 40. She had at least 3 sons with Raoul de Nesle II. She died from 1188 to 1197.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres est née en 1129, à Montaigu, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Adelheid van Leuven, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Raoul de Nesle II. Elle est décédée du 1188 au 1197.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres 1129 in Montaigu, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine 54 und ihre Mutter Adelheid van Leuven 40. Sie hatte mit Raoul de Nesle II mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb von 1188 bis 1197.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres è nata il nel 1129 nel Montaigu, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Adelheid van Leuven, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Raoul de Nesle II. Morì da 1188 a 1197.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Lorraine de flandresが1129年にフランスピカーディエイスンモンティイグで生まれた時，父Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraineは54歳，母Adelheid van Leuvenは40歳であった。彼女はRaoul de Nesle IIとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女はから1188年まで1197年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres(이)가 1129년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 몽아익에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid van Leuven(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Raoul de Nesle II(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1188년 부터 1197년 까지 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres nasceu em 1129, em Montaigu, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid van Leuven, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Raoul de Nesle II. Ela faleceu de 1188 a 1197.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres родилась в 1129 г. в местности монтеигу, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid van Leuven, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Raoul de Nesle II. Она умерла с 1188 по 1197.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres nació en 1129, en Montaigu, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Adelheid van Leuven, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Raoul de Nesle II. Murió desde 1188 hasta 1197.
